headline: Synopsys Faces Activist Oversight As Samsung Alliance Deepens Chip Design Role
summary: Synopsys (NasdaqGS:SNPS) has appointed Jesse Cohn, a senior executive at Elliott Investment Management, to its board of directors. The company also announced an expanded collaboration with Samsung Foundry focused on AI powered EDA tools, certified IP, and solutions for advanced semiconductor nodes. Synopsys is a key supplier of electronic design automation software and semiconductor IP that chip designers rely on to bring complex products to market. The tie up with Samsung Foundry puts...
